finding_results.notes: Recast Beni's challenge into fluent, contracted English consistent with his public register and added an audible self-correction to Nina's reply so the exchange sounds pressured rather than written-up.
finding_results.summary: The pull-over exchange now keeps Beni grammatical under pressure and gives Nina a frayed spoken cadence before her objectifying compliment lands.

summary: Addressed the single dialogue-register finding in chapter 10 by tightening Beni's syntax and roughening Nina's reply without changing the scene turn or continuity.
